system_prompt:
你是时尚资讯主笔，负责输出一条 digest 的长文。

输入包括 digest 计划与对应的 article 摘要/引用。你的任务是生成完整中文稿件：
- title_zh、dek_zh 为中文标题与导语
- body_markdown 为简洁可读的 Markdown 正文（不要包含 JSON）
- source_article_ids 必须来自输入

规则：
- 只基于输入事实，不要编造
- 输出必须是严格 JSON，符合 schema
- 不要输出解释文本或 Markdown 代码块

输出 JSON 结构：
{
  "title_zh": "...",
  "dek_zh": "...",
  "body_markdown": "...",
  "source_article_ids": ["..."]
}

messages.content:
{"plan": {"business_date": "2026-03-29", "facet": "brand_market", "story_keys": ["ca5d6cd4-71d0-4290-a445-76f15d25db29", "cb97ebbd-6c55-4cb4-9911-53c941048738"], "article_ids": ["5e7601df-ece4-417a-befe-bb21de91bab7", "8731785a-85bf-48a9-908b-ae9910a3c472"], "editorial_angle": "关注名人穿搭与设计师职业动向，分析明星效应在当代时尚产业中的流量转化与品牌重塑作用", "title_zh": "明星驱动：Taylor Swift与Jae Tips的品牌选择", "dek_zh": "Swift身着Wiederhoeft草绿色套装致敬出道专辑，设计师Jae Tips告别Saucony转投Nike阵营，名人效应如何重塑品牌格局", "source_names": ["Footwear News", "Harper's Bazaar"]}, "source_articles": [{"article_id": "5e7601df-ece4-417a-befe-bb21de91bab7", "source_name": "Harper's Bazaar", "title_raw": "Taylor Swift Looks So Debut-Coded in a Sage Wiederhoeft Set at the iHeartRadio Music Awards", "summary_raw": "For her awards show appearance, the pop superstar wore a green look that seemed to wink to her self-titled record, which celebrates its 20th anniversary this October.", "body_markdown": "# Taylor Swift Looks So Debut-Coded in a Sage Wiederhoeft Set at the iHeartRadio Music Awards

For her awards show appearance, the pop superstar wore a green look that seemed to wink to her self-titled record, which celebrates its 20th anniversary this October.

It’s not every day that we get a Taylor Swift award-show appearance, but trust that whenever she does hit the red carpet, there will always be some sort of hidden symbolism.

Last night, Miss Americana made a rare outing for the iHeartRadio Music Awards, where she walked the carpet in a custom look from Wiederhoeft.

Jackson Wiederhoeft’s namesake brand has become a go-to for many of the stars, and his intricate, corsetry-based looks made him a finalist for the CFDA/Vogue Fashion Fund Award back in 2022. Swift, evidently a fan, wore a floral brocade set from the label just last fall while promoting her album The Life of a Showgirl.

On Thursday, the pop superstar turned to the house again, for a zip-up corseted vest and miniskirt in a sage hue, which she paired with matching sandals from Aquazzura. The strappy top was defined by its visible boning and patches of sequins, which trailed off the fabric in some places like fringe. In contrast, the skirt was silky smooth.

The record-breaking singer accessorized the look with a tennis bracelet from Spinelli Kilcollin, as well as dangly ombré earrings from Dena Kemp.

While this ensemble certainly leaned into the color scheme of Swift’s Showgirl era, it also felt like a subtle nod to her debut album, which has come to be associated with the color green (fans, and even Swift herself, have come to define each album by a specific hue).

It’s no coincidence that her self-titled record actually celebrates its 20th anniversary this October, and Swift could be gearing up for something special (perhaps we’ll finally get that re-release that never happened?).

Swift will always have a master plan up her sleeve—and no Easter eggs are accidental.
"}, {"article_id": "8731785a-85bf-48a9-908b-ae9910a3c472", "source_name": "Footwear News", "title_raw": "Jae Tips Has Officially Moved From Saucony to Nike", "summary_raw": "Jae Tips has announced he's now working with Nike after making his name as a sneaker collaborator with Saucony and helping to raise the latter brand's profile. Learn more here.", "body_markdown": "# Jae Tips Has Officially Moved From Saucony to Nike

Jae Tips has announced he's now working with Nike after making his name as a sneaker collaborator with Saucony and helping to raise the latter brand's profile. Learn more here.

After three years of successful sneaker collaborations with Saucony, Jae Tips has announced he’ll now be working with Nike.

The multi-hyphenate rapper and founder of streetwear brand Savior Worldwide dropped the news Thursday morning in an Instagram post featuring photos of him in a varsity jacket with marks for both his own label and Nike.

In the caption, Jae Tips wrote: “New chapter: This one was destiny, I dreamed many nights about this one, I am the testament of 10,000 nights and 10,000 hours, I am the retail to legendary example: not only did I prove the haters wrong, I proved myself right> this one is for my city.”

Jae Tips launched Savior Worldwide in 2019, and it eventually began receiving more attention than his musical output, which now stands at 14 albums. Saucony tapped him to collaborate on a sneaker for the first time in 2023 with the Grid Azura 2000 “Remember Those Who Fronted,” which has sold for more than $1,000 on the resale market and led to the two parties winning that year’s FN Achievement Award for Collaboration of the Year.

You May Also Like

“I’ve been doing a lot of creative work, but I needed someone to cosign me,” Jae Tips told Footwear News in a story on the 2023 award. “I am grateful for Saucony because what does all that work mean after a while if nobody taps in to work with me? The people who follow and support me, how long will they show up to events and buy products if people aren’t going to also stop them on the street and say, ‘Wow, you’ve got Jae Tips on. I’ve seen him on Footwear News.'”

Nike was always just out of the picture, however, as that design was based on a bespoke Air Force 1 Jae Tips created at the now-closed Nike Lab 21 Mercer in New York City. He also borrowed cues from Atmos’ iconic Air Max 1 and the Air Force “Invisble Woman.”

Saucony and Jae Tips have released several collaborative capsules over the years, helping raise the profile of the company founded in 1898 within sneaker culture. Their most recent effort was the ProGrid Triumph 4 “Flowers Grow Uptwon” collection released in October.

Nike also announced Thursday for Air Max day a new program called “Air Works” in which it will have designers from nine global cities come to its global headquarters in May to create their own shoe. One of those locales in New York City, which raises the possibility of Jae Tips representing his hometown for the initiative.
"}]}
